5.description: Out-of-sample MVE cumulative returns Cumulative returns of the OOS fMVE in different specifications. The left panel fixes K = 3 and plots the benchmark specification in green, the unregularized in blue, and the market factor in red for comparison. 6.description: News-based pricing kernel (‚ÅÝxMVE‚ÅÝ) forecasts future macroeconomic variables Each figure reports the estimation results of predictive regression (9) for a macroeconomic variable. The red line plots coefficient (bh) estimates, and the shaded band represents the 90% confidence interval. We use the Newey-West standard errors computed with h lags to account for the autocorrelation.

7.description: Risk factor interpretation at the narrative level This figure plots the narrative-level impact vectors. The length of the bars represents the absolute values of corresponding entries, with red for negative impact and blue for positive.
